title: 🐙 Set Up GitHub
description:
## What
Set up proper GitHub integration for the OpenClaw workspace — SSH keys, git config, and repository access.

## Steps
1. Configure git user identity:
   - `git config --global user.name "OpenClaw"`
   - `git config --global user.email "openclaw@users.noreply.github.com"`
2. Generate SSH key if not present: `ssh-keygen -t ed25519`
3. Add public key to GitHub account: https://github.com/settings/keys
4. Test connection: `ssh -T git@github.com`
5. Create GitHub personal access token (see companion card)
6. Set up remote for workspace repo if needed

## Why
- Enables pushing code to GitHub
- Enables Guard Dog and other agents to use authenticated GitHub API
- Required for PR creation, issue tracking, and CI/CD

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `ssh -T git@github.com` succeeds
- [ ] `git push` works from workspace
- [ ] GITHUB_TOKEN configured (see 'Install GitHub Token' card)
